These facilities are open 24/7 and handle most arrests in the county.Can I visit someone in Kent Police custody?Visits to custody are not normally permitted. However, detained persons can have someone informed of their arrest and can receive visits from their solicitor or legal representative.How do I contact Kent Police custody?You can contact Kent Police custody suites directly using the phone numbers listed on this page. For general enquiries, call 101 or visit your local police station.Need Legal Help?Find a Kent RepAccredited representatives in KentYour RightsPACE rights at the police stationArrested?What to do if you're arrested
